message:
test(resize): add 21 edge-case and adversarial tests for resize invariant enforcement (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add comprehensive integration test file covering boundary conditions,
degenerate inputs, and multi-pane interaction patterns:

- Scheduler: no seqs, active-only, u64::MAX, commit without seqs,
  queue depth boundary, multi-pane independence
- Screen: 1x1 minimum viable, cursor at/past right edge, zero rows,
  large scrollback, excess lines warning
- Presentation: all-zeros consistent, PTY-terminal gap (F1 race),
  terminal-screen stale, rows-only mismatch
- Phase transitions: exhaustive valid/illegal coverage, self-transitions
- Telemetry: multi-report aggregation, severity count verification

All 21 tests pass, clippy clean.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
